page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 224.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the weak category. However, the instance leverages its high core count to deliver average multi-core performance, as evidenced by stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core benchmarks. Notably, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression achieves strong performance, placing in the top 25 percent. Memory bandwidth for both cached and uncached operations remains in the average tier, alongside static web serving throughput and Redis SET operations.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource ratio, the ecs.sn2.13xlarge offers a stable, predictable environment for multi-threaded workloads. The qualitative cost efficiency is characterized by its high resource density, making it suitable for parallel processing tasks that can offset the lower single-core performance. This instance is best suited for general-purpose workloads, multi-threaded data processing, software compilation, and web serving applications that benefit from high core counts rather than maximum single-thread velocity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 56 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 224.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core capabilities but average multi-core and memory bandwidth performance, with strong multi-threaded decompression speeds. This hardware profile makes the instance well-suited for parallelized workloads, multi-threaded data processing, software compilation, and general-purpose web serving where multi-core scaling can compensate for moderate single-thread performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 224 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering balanced multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.13xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 56 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 224 GB RAM on a KVM hypervisor.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core platform offering balanced memory and compute resources for parallelized enterprise workloads and multi-threaded data processing.
bullet_points: 56 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores at 2.5 GHz
224.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-threaded decompression and average multi-core benchmark performance
Optimized for parallel processing, software compilation, and web serving
